description: Universal PR review acceptance checklist contract

core.title: Diff is scoped and coherent
core.description: Change set stays within expected scope and file-count guardrails.

core.title: Required CI signals are green
core.description: No required CI check is currently failing for this head SHA.

core.title: Evidence package exists
core.description: Evidence manifest and artifacts are present and readable.

core.title: At least 2 screenshots captured
core.description: PR evidence contains at least the configured screenshot minimum.

core.title: At least 1 video captured
core.description: PR evidence contains at least the configured video minimum.

core.title: No harness policy violations
core.description: Risk/policy gate decision is in an allowed pass state.
